titleStmt.title: SII 9.597: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 597. (A.R. No. 49 of 1917.) ON A STONE SET UP ON THE TANK-BUND AT TAMMADAHALLI, MADAKSIRA TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1463, Plava, Kārtika, ba. 2, Śanivāra, corresponding to A.D. 1541 November, 4, Saturday, in the reign of Achyutadēva-Mahārāya. It records that the tank of the village Tammaḍihaḷḷi having breached at three places, Chenna-Gauṇḍa and Timma-Gauṇḍa repaired the breaches at their own cost and that they were granted kaṭṭugoḍagi land for perpetual enjoyment by Tipparāja Mahā-arasu, agent of Veṅkaṭādri-Nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavarṣa
1463 neya plavasaṁvatsarada kārtika ba 2 śanivāradalū
śrīmatu . śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa A
cyutadēvamahārāyaru pruthivīrājyaṁgeyiUttiralāgi yī taṁ
maḍihaḷḷi keṟe mūru vaḍavāgi vaḍedu khilavāgi yiralāgi . veṁka
ṭādrināyakara kāryyake kartarāda dharmapratipālakarāda tipparā
jamahāarasugaḷū �yo ta(ṁ)mmaḍihaḷḷiya ceṁnagōṁḍa ti(ṁ)mma
gōṁḍanavaru yī vaḍadu khilavāda kereyanu taṁma kaya ho(ṁ)
nna Ikki kaṭṭisalāgi veṁkaṭādrināyakara Appaṇeyiṁdalū tipparājayanu koṭṭa
kaṭṭugoḍagige sarvamānyavāgi koṭṭa gadde kha 1 khaṁḍuga
gaddenu nīu ni(ṁ)mma putrapautrapāraṁpariyāgi Ācaṁ
drārkkasthāyigaḷāgi naḍuvaḷḷa talapareya nērula mavinamara
da staḷadalū marada gade kha 1 Ā khaṁḍuga ga
denu sukhadiṁ Anubhavisuvadū yaṁdu koṭṭa kaṭugo
ḍagi śāsana �yo manyavanu Ārobaru Aḷupidaru taṁma
taṁde tāya vāraṇāsili koṁda pāpake hōguvaru
gōva koṁda pāpake hōdavaru nāya māṁsa
tiṁdavaru .
Digital edition of SII 9.597 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
